heading: We started this because too many trips get booked on guesswork
paragraph1: Most first-time visitors to the Maldives make their biggest decisions — resort or guesthouse, which transfer, which island — based on a handful of photos and a price they don't fully understand yet. That's how people end up with a surprise seaplane bill, a resort that doesn't suit their kids' ages, or a guesthouse booking that turns out to be nothing at all.
paragraph2: Huvadhoo Maldives Travel exists to close that gap. We're based in the Maldives, we check every supplier and partner ourselves, and we quote one honest total price before you commit — whether you're booking a $150-a-night guesthouse or a private-island honeymoon suite.
pullquote: We'd rather send you to the right $150 guesthouse than the wrong $800 resort. That's genuinely the whole business model.
